title: Tamil Nadu government formation: VCK, IUML extend unconditional support to Vijay’s TVK
description: In identically worded letters, similar to those sent by the Left parties and addressed to the Governor, Thol. Thirumavalavan and Kader Mohideen said their respective parties extended unconditional support to the TVK, under the leadership of party president C. Joseph Vijay, to form the government
